---
description: "Use when creating or editing Markdown files. Covers spacing, list formatting, and heading conventions for this repository."
applyTo: "**/*.{md,markdown}"
---

# Markdown Editing Rules

- Do not add empty lines between headings and the content that follows.
- Add one empty line between a heading and another heading or a list.
- Add one empty line between normal text and a list.
- Use `*` for unordered lists, not `-`.
- Use one space after `*` or numbered list markers.
- Do not use bold text inside lists, use backticks instead.
- Use headings instead of bold-only section labels.
- Preserve the existing structure unless the task explicitly asks for structural changes.
